features: One tablet a day to relieve hay-fever symptoms
Taken to relieve the symptoms of hay-fever and other allergies, including: skin and pet allergies, Mould spore/house dust mite allergies, sneezing and itchy eyes
description: Product Description Number of Tablets 30 Tablets Number of Boxes 1 Box Brand RelonChem Product RelonChem Cetirizine Hydrochloride 10mg Format Tablet Suitable for Hayfever and other allergies, including: skin and pet allergies, Mould spore/house dust mite allergies, sneezing and itchy eyes What is Cetirizine used for RelonChem Cetirizine Hydrochloride 10mg tablets are used to treat hayfever, year-round allergies (dust, pets), and urticaria. Cetirizine is an antihistamine that blocks histamine, a substance involved in allergic reactions. It relieves symptoms like sneezing, runny nose, itchy eyes, and skin rashes. Adults/children 12+: 1 tablet daily. Ages 6–12: ½ tablet twice daily. Not for under 6s. See leaflet for full info and dosing for renal impairment.
